Contact Agent Image La Connessa This modern Italian trattoria, nestled in the heart of Potrero Hill, offers a vibrant atmosphere and a menu that celebrates the best of Italian cuisine with a contemporary twist. Image Magic Donuts & Coffee Coffee shop offering sourdough donuts, plus cake options, with bold flavors and crisp textures. The Neighborhood Home. Nature. Neighborhood. Directly across from Jackson Park, this desirable Potrero Hill location is surrounded by quaint streets with local cafes, boutique retail and a storied community, all while adjacent to major freeway access. The retail at Mason boasts three new restaurant concepts from beloved San Francisco restauranteurs, Bacchus Group. Mason on Mariposa’s landscape design is inspired by the site’s natural history, with meandering passages and central Paseo that offer both connection to the surrounding neighborhood and moments of quiet retreat. About Our Pricing Pricing and options can vary based on lease terms, move-in date, and availability, and may change at any time. Specials or concessions may be offered depending on lease length and move-in date and usually apply only to the first full billing cycle. Restrictions apply, and specials do not apply to current residents, transfers, or anyone who lived with us in the last 90 days. Deposits may change based on credit, rental history, or other qualifying standards. Furnished homes and corporate leases may have additional premiums. For leases starting on or after the 25th of the month, your move-in balance will include prorated rent for the current month plus the next month’s rent (not applicable in Massachusetts). In New York, leases starting within 10 days of the upcoming month will include prorated rent for the move-in month plus full rent for the following month. In Massachusetts and Colorado, the total monthly price includes base rent plus any required monthly charges. Floor plans are artist’s renderings; actual layouts, sizes, and features may vary. Not all features and amenities are available in every home. Occupancy guidelines may apply. Equal housing opportunity provider. Enter. No key-fumbling required. Venture onwards to the kitchen, outfitted with sleek stainless steel appliances. Next, the bathroom’s soaking tub beckons for a post-work respite. Turn your gaze to the floor-to-ceiling windows, framing a view that stretches beyond San Francisco’s limits across the Bay and beyond—the backdrop to your new life. Join The Family Contact Us Schedule a Tour Join The Conversation Sincerely Yours Jasper is a convergence. Of structure and imagination. Of the classic and the eclectic. Of art and life. This 400-foot high-rise apartment building crowns San Francisco’s fabled The East Cut and stands as an iconic addition to the city skyline. Live Up. Make Yourself at Home Where you live is where you come alive. In one of San Francisco's most eclectic and vibrant neighborhoods, Avalon Dogpatch connects you to everything needed to upgrade your lifestyle. Within our community of courtyard-connected homes, you'll find thoughtfully designed studio, one-, two- and three bedroom apartments and townhomes. Entertain in a modern, open kitchen featuring stone countertops, tile backsplash and stainless steel appliances. Upgrade any home to Furnished+ and enjoy the convenience of turnkey living. Live your life effortlessly with amenities including a fully-loaded fitness center with yoga studio and Fitness on Demand programming. Relax in our indoor/outdoor lounge with entertaining spaces or unwind on one of the rooftop decks with stunning Bay views. Your four-legged friend will be pampered at our WAG Pet Spa, with the added benefit of an adjacent public dog park just steps away. Just beyond your doorstep lies the newly transformed Esprit Park — a sophisticated urban oasis designed for both humans and their furry friends. Hop on your bike to take in the sun, explore the waterfront, and appreciate all that Dogpatch offers. A haven for artists and craftspeople, this ever evolving neighborhood promises something for everyone. From artisanal ice cream to handcrafted keepsakes to urban wineries, Dogpatch keeps everything within your reach. This is not just apartment living. This is living up. Because of Mission Bay by Windsor, teachers, firefighters, health care workers, recent college graduates, young families and other members of San Francisco’s critical workforce will have a place to call home. Mission Bay by Windsor offers a selection of modern one-, two-, and three-bedroom apartment homes, thoughtfully designed to enhance your lifestyle. Each residence features open-concept kitchens with Energy Star stainless steel appliances, nine-foot ceilings, and full-size washers and dryers. Walk-in closets provide ample storage, while keyless entry and expansive windows offering breathtaking views elevate everyday living. Designed with both comfort and functionality in mind, these residences create a seamless blend of contemporary style and urban convenience. SoMa isn't just trendy—it's a pedestrian-friendly gateway for your Financial District commute and a central hub for public transit, making it easy to explore nearby cities and neighborhoods. Whether you're drawn to a lively area with diverse restaurants and nightlife or seeking a central location, SoMa Square is ideally situated to meet your needs.
